summary: Completed comprehensive testing of phone+password authentication system for Elo Christian social network. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend flows (login, register, logout) work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth implementation is solid with bcrypt password hashing
Session tokens stored in MongoDB with proper expiration
httpOnly cookies set correctly with secure=True and samesite=none
Phone normalization handles formatted input correctly
seed_data_creation: Test user seeded automatically on backend startup: phone=11999999999, password=teste123
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phone+password auth fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_auth.py cover: registration (success + validation errors), login (success + wrong password), /auth/me (with session + without), logout. Frontend Playwright tests verified login form, register form, and logout button all work correctly. Google OAuth has been successfully replaced with phone+password auth.

backend_api: GET /api/auth/me - returns user with valid session cookie
frontend_ui: Login page shows phone+password form (not Google login)
Register tab (Criar conta) visible and functional
Login flow redirects to /feed on success
Register flow redirects to /feed on success
